Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.utils

Class Variations

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.utils.Variations
public class Variations extends Object
Generates variations of a given predicate, according to different criteria.

Implementation notes : When working with integer relations, we reduce all cases to less-than positive operators. We do not process contracted operators (such as NOTEQUAL), assuming they have been removed by the normalization.

This class has two levels:
  • Level 0 is the initial implementation with general rules about equalities, inequalities and subsets.
  • Level 1 adds variations between numeric comparisons and set membership to NAT and NAT1 as well as equivalences between booleans.

    • getLevel

      public Variations.Level getLevel()
      Get the implementation level.
      Returns:

    • getWeakerPositive

      public List<Predicate> getWeakerPositive(Predicate pred)
      Returns a list of predicates Q such that 
       P => Q
      where P is some predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate
      Returns:
      a list of predicates weaker than the given predicate

    • getWeakerPositiveRelational

      private List<Predicate> getWeakerPositiveRelational(int tag, Expression lhs, Expression rhs)

    • getWeakerNegative

      public List<Predicate> getWeakerNegative(Predicate pred)
      Returns a list of predicates Q such that 
       ¬ P => Q
      where P is the given predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate
      Returns:
      a list of predicates weaker than the negation of the input predicate

    • getStrongerPositive

      public List<Predicate> getStrongerPositive(Predicate pred)
      Returns a list of predicates Q such that 
       Q => P
      where P is some predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate
      Returns:
      a list of predicates stronger than the given predicate

    • getStrongerPositiveRelational

      private List<Predicate> getStrongerPositiveRelational(int tag, Expression lhs, Expression rhs)

    • getStrongerNegative

      public List<Predicate> getStrongerNegative(Predicate pred)
      Returns a list of predicates Q such that 
       Q => ¬ P
      where P is the given predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate
      Returns:
      a list of predicates stronger than the negation of the input predicate

    • getEquivalent

      public List<Predicate> getEquivalent(Predicate pred)
      Returns a list of predicates equivalent to the given predicate.
      Parameters:
      pred - a predicate
      Returns:
      a list of equivalent predicates
